caption: A young man wearing a light-colored, patterned button-down shirt sits at a white desk in front of a brick wall and a window. He is focused on several open books and notebooks, using his hand to flip through the pages of an orange-covered book. To his left sits a thick, white spiral-bound notebook. Throughout the sequence, he remains in the same position, continuing to examine the materials on the desk. White subtitles appear at the bottom of the frames; the first three frames display the text, "This can really help me, it must." In the final frame, the text changes to, "Because I work a lot and I am proud of it." The lighting is bright, and the scene maintains a consistent, studious atmosphere as he interacts with his study materials.
